lines: Welcome to my shop, traveler!
What can I do for you today?
This little shop has been in my family for three generations.
A lot of inexperienced travelers tend to come around these parts. I keep a lot of stuff people would consider basic.
Oh its horrible, apparently some insane person walked into the cow pen and just slew ol' Bob.
Heard the farmer down south west saw it all happen, hopefully he can describe the killer so Bob can get justice!
A cold-eyed vampire watches you.
A visitor. They don't usually walk in on their own.
She's mine. I made her. You don't get to take that back.

options.label: I'll take it by force, then.

lines: We're not done.
The girl's free of me. Enjoy it while it lasts.
My fledgling's back, and she's brought help. What do you want?

options.label: The power you gave her. Give it to me too.

lines: That isn't handed out for free.

options.label: Forget it. I've changed my mind.

lines: There's a prisoner across the river. Bring me his heart and the dark blood is yours.
We're not done.
It's done. You've got the dark blood now.
Use it well.
My cows are dying. Something's draining the blood right out of them, two holes in the neck and nothing left inside.

options.label: I'll find out what's doing it.

lines: Start at the Cow field. Be careful.
The dead ones are out by the Field. Go and look.
Found what's killing my cattle yet?
Hurry up. I'm losing animals.
No dead cows this morning. First time in a week. That you?

options.label: It's handled. Nothing else will touch your livestock.

lines: Good work. Here, take this charm. It's no use to me.
Cows are still dying, and now there's two of those things out there. You were no help at all.
Then clear off my land.
Quiet nights again. Thanks.
Borin turns away and refuses to speak to you.
Stay back. I don't want to hurt you.
I didn't mean to. I woke up like this. The elder vampire, Lord Mortrek, bit me and left me out here.

options.label: I can break the curse. Hold still.
Don't fight it. Come with me. We'll go to him together.

lines: Have you decided? I can't stay out here much longer.

options.label: I can break the curse. Hold still.
Don't fight it. Come with me. We'll go to him together.

lines: You'd try? Then go to the Graveyard. His hold still ties me to him. Break it and the curse breaks too.
...Alright. Take me to the Graveyard.
Please hurry. I can feel him in my head.
The castle's this way. Come on.
